name: Wild Rice Baked Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, thoroughly wash the wild rice and drain in a strainer.
2. Spray a nonstick sprayed 2-quart casserole or baking dish.
3. Mix the wild rice, celery, green peppers, water, bouillon, and salt in the dish.
4. Skin one-half of the chicken breasts and place on top of the rice mixture; brush with soy sauce.
5. Cover the dish and bake at 350°F for 1 1/2 hours or until the wild rice is tender.
This recipe is excellent.
